response.overview: In the high-stakes world of real estate, success often comes down to how far you're willing to go. For one top-performing agent, things take an unexpectedly erotic turn when a confident, irresistibly sexy client, Nelly Kent offers a very intimate deal in exchange for a discount - right there in the property she's trying to snatch. Back at the office, the atmosphere is just as charged, with coworkers, Angelika and Mark, already heating things up and more than happy to invite you into the mix. But the real surprise comes at the next showing, where a gorgeous rival agent, Alexis Crystal, is already charming your beautiful client, Lily Blossom. Turns out, both agents were hired for the same job - but in the spirit of sharing, your client proposes a passionate three-way solution. In this business, the commission isn't the only thing worth sharing.
response.title: Co-Listed
